title: bus.tengine.screenshot.luminance v1
description: When: After a screenshot PNG is written, luminance statistics are computed and emitted as a summary. Source: /tengine. Consumers use this to detect rendering anomalies (all-black frames, luminance spikes) and feed visual regression pipelines.

host.description: Hostname of the machine that generated this event.

session_id.description: Tengine session identifier for correlation with other session events.

silo.description: Silo name that produced this screenshot.

frame.description: Frame counter at which this screenshot was captured.

path.description: Absolute filesystem path to the screenshot PNG file.

mean_lum.description: Mean luminance of all pixels in the screenshot, normalized to [0, 1].

p05_lum.description: 5th percentile luminance; useful for detecting dark patches.

p95_lum.description: 95th percentile luminance; useful for detecting bright spikes.

all_black.description: True when mean_lum is below the threshold and the frame is effectively black, indicating a rendering failure.
